articles.author: Tucker  Reals, Lucia I Suarez Sang
articles.title: Live Updates: U.S. fighter jet downed over Iran, 1 crew member rescued by American forces - CBS News
articles.description: Iran shot down a U.S. fighter jet and one crew member was rescued by American forces as a search continues for a 2nd crew member, U.S. officials say.
articles.content: The CMA CGM Kribi, sailing under a Malta flag and operated by French shipping company CMA CGM, became possibly the first vessel with links to France to pass through the Strait of Hormuz since Iran ef… [+1782 chars]

articles.author: Zack Sharf
articles.title: Brian Cox Drags Tarantino, Says Jeremy Strong Has ‘Begged Me to Stop’ Discussing His Method Acting and Disses America for Not Liking Women: ‘The Patriarchy Is a F—ing Mess’ - Variety
articles.description: Brian Cox takes aim at Quentin Tarantino, Ian McKellen, Edward Norton in a new interview and says Jeremy Strong wants him to stop talking about him.
articles.content: Brian Cox is never one to mince his words when it comes to fellow Hollywood talents, having targeted his “25th Hour” co-star Edward Norton (“a pain in the arse”), Ian McKellen (“not to my taste”) and… [+2998 chars]
